data.title: Tether CEO: The previously minted 2 billion USDT was swapped with other chains
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino responded to Tether's minting of 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum chain in a post on the X platform. He said that Binance has swapped 2 billion USDT from the Tron chain to 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: Multicoin’s Kyle Samani expected to be chairman for Solana treasury company: Sources
data.description:
The Solana DAT reportedly plans to raise $1 billion
source: https://blockworks.co/news/samani-expected-chairman-solana-treasury

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation News: Fed Sets Stablecoin Showdown and Spot Trading Gains Momentum
data.description:
This week in crypto and regulation, the storylines were unusually cinematic. The Federal Reserve set the stage for a showdown over stablecoins, showing the growing tension between innovation and oversight in global payments.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-news-fed-sets-stablecoin-showdown-trump-family-crypto-bet-and-spot-trading-gains-momentum/

data.title: SEC and CFTC Propose Regulated U.S. Perpetual Swaps
data.description:
SEC and CFTC consider introducing regulated perpetual swaps in the U. S. , impacting crypto market dynamics.
source: https://coincu.com/360278-sec-cftc-regulated-perpetual-swaps

data.title: US regulators release joint statement teasing 24/7 capital markets
data.description:
A 24/7 trading cycle would create new opportunities and risks for traditional financial markets that do not operate on nights and weekends.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-cftc-statement-24-7-capital-markets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.description:
Spectra Markets president Brent Donnelly says the cryptocurrency is behaving like a risk asset rather than a safe haven, and […] The post Bitcoin Warning: Double Top Signals Deeper Drop appeared first on Coindoo.
source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-warning-double-top-signals-deeper-drop/

data.title: Crypto’s Growth Is Outpacing the Internet — and Eric Trump Might Be Right
data.description:
The rapid expansion and adoption of cryptocurrency technology and digital assets are currently advancing at a pace that surpasses the growth experienced by the early days of the internet, and in light of this phenomenon, it seems that Eric Trump may have a valid perspective on the potential implications and future of this revolutionary financial frontier.
source: https://blocknews.com/cryptos-growth-is-outpacing-the-internet-and-eric-trump-might-be-right/

data.title: Coinbase Dumps 83% XRP; Reserves Down From 60 To 10 Wallets
data.description:
Coinbase’s XRP holdings have never been this scarce: liquidity crunch or decentralized hoarding?
source: https://dailycoin.com/coinbase-dumps-80-xrp-reserves-down-from-60-to-10-wallets/?utm_source=cryptopanic&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Ethereum bull alert: ETH exchange ‘flux’ turns negative for the first time
data.description:
Ether’s exchange flux metric turned negative for the first time in history, signaling a shift in investor behavior and Ether’s potential to resume its uptrend.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-bull-run-eth-exchange-flux-turns-negative-for-the-first-time?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin Falls 2% Despite Rising Odds of Fed Easing After Weak U.S. Jobs Report  – $108K BTC By Weekend?
data.description:
Bitcoin fell 2% despite a weak U. S. jobs report showing only 22,000 new jobs versus 76,500 expected and unemployment rising to 4. 3%, increasing Fed easing odds while whale reserves dropped over 100,000 BTC in thirty days as analysts target $108K by weekend.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-falls-2-despite-rising-odds-of-fed-easing-after-weak-u-s-jobs-report-108k-btc-by-weekend/

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs lose almost $400M but institutional interest still active
data.description:
Spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs posted significant outflows of nearly $400 million on Sept. 4, extending the asset class’s week of uneven performance. According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin ETFs reversed a two-day streak of inflows and closed with $227 million in net outflows
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/bitcoin-and-ethereum-etfs-lose-almost-400m-but-institutional-interest-still-active/

data.title: The U.S. Senate may release the latest draft of market structure legislation today
data.description: Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that the U.S. Senate Banking Committee is expected to release the latest draft of market structure legislation as early as today, reflecting feedback from the public comment period before the August recess.

data.title: Data: Tether and Circle have minted $12 billion in stablecoins in the past month
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, with Tether minting 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum chain, Tether and Circle have minted a total of $12 billion in stablecoins in the past month.

data.title: Fed's Williams: Cutting interest rates to a neutral level would be appropriate
data.description: Fed Chairman Williams said that the Fed's balance sheet reduction is progressing very smoothly and that it would be appropriate to cut interest rates to a neutral level. Overly strict policies that last for too long could endanger employment, and it would be appropriate to cut interest rates over time. (Jinshi)

data.title: On September 4, the US Bitcoin ETF had a net inflow of 2,569 BTC, while the Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of 15,444 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, on September 4, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 2,569 BTC, of ​​which BlackRock received 2,588 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 750,058 BTC, worth US$82.21 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 15,444 ETH, of which BlackRock received 33,884 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 3,743,379 ETH, worth US$16.13 billion.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Sees Increased Validator Activity
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network is experiencing significant validator activity. The current exit queue stands at 789,101 ETH, which is approximately valued at $3.39 billion. The withdrawal delay is reported to be 13 days and 17 hours.

Simultaneously, there is a rise in staking demand from new validators. The entry queue has increased to 936,769 ETH, valued at around $4.025 billion, with a current queue time of 16 days and 6 hours.

data.title: Fed's Williams: Expected to see gradual rate cuts
data.description: Fed's Williams said that if the economy meets my forecast, interest rates are expected to be gradually lowered, monetary policy will be moderately tightened, which is appropriate for the current economy, and inflation is expected to return to the Fed's 2% target in 2027.

data.title: Bedrock: uniBTC and brBTC are now available on Aptos to expand BTCFi
data.description: Bedrock announced on the X platform that uniBTC and brBTC have been launched on Aptos to expand BTCFi. Users can now bridge uniBTC and brBTC from Ethereum or BNB Chain to Aptos.

data.title: Two wallets suspected to belong to the same whale sold 3,690 ETH
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, due to the drop in ETH prices, two wallets (possibly belonging to the same whale) panic-sold 3,690 ETH (US$15.6 million) they had just purchased yesterday, losing US$944,000.

data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Not recommending handing over Fed control to the president
data.description: Federal Reserve Board nominee Michael Milan has stated that he does not recommend handing control of the Fed to the president. The Fed in the 1970s failed to raise interest rates enough to keep pace with price increases, and the inflation of the 1970s was caused by both Fed errors and supply shocks. The Fed confused nominal and real interest rates in the 1970s. (Jinshi)
